scripts.bootstrap: npm --prefix backend install --include=dev && npm --prefix frontend install --include=dev
scripts.dev: concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c cyan,magenta "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.lint: npm --prefix backend run lint && npm --prefix frontend run lint
scripts.test: npm --prefix backend run test && npm --prefix frontend run test
scripts.build: node -e "const { execSync } = require('node:child_process'); const cmd = process.env.VERCEL ? 'npm --prefix frontend run build' : 'npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build'; execSync(cmd, { stdio: 'inherit' });"
scripts.quality: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
